highlights.text: My lean was they could and I wrote Friday at 4pm: “My general lean is to defer to the trend.
For that, we need a setup and as readers know, I trade the same setup institutions use to accumulate: The Failed Breakdown.
I wrote in my Thursday 2:30pm newsletter (before earnings): “The last ditch shot for bulls would to flush and put in a Failed Breakdown of today’s 6869 or so low.

I wrote Thursday at 2:30PM: “One can try the 6841-43 long if its a controlled dip.” On Friday afternoon we sold to 6843, held it exact, recovered Thurday’s 6851 daily low, and ripped to 6900 then sold into Friday’s close.
In today’s newsletter I’ll talk this, I’ll do a deep dive into the multi-tude of Failed Breakdowns we had last week (5 since Wednesday alone).

post_title: SPX Is Coiled Tight (Again). Move Incoming. What Way? November 4 Plan
